en.title: For Starlink Ethernet Adapter V2 (2 Pack) Waterproof Star Link Cable SPX to RJ45 Adapters Female Connectors for Starlink Actuated Gen 2 Dishy and Router Repair Kit Accessories
en.description_html:
• 2 Pack Starlink Cable Adapters: 1 * SPX V2 Plug (Dish) Male to RJ45 Female adapter (T568B), 1 * SPX V2 Plug (Router) Male to RJ45 Female adapter (T568B). Specially designed for the Starlink Rectangular Satellite V2. Note: CAT6A Regular Ethernet cable not included.

  • Both Male and Female Ports - Waterproof: The ends on both sides of the adapter adopt IP68 waterproof design, suitable for indoor and outdoor use. It can effectively prevent network components from getting damp and dirty to ensure connection quality.

  • Strong Anti-Interference: The adaptador starlink contains 26AWG single-core copper and has a metal shielding layer on the outside to ensure the best connection.

  • Installation Method - Extension or Repair: Connect the CAT6A Ethernet cable through an adapter to achieve the Starlink cable length you need. If you have professional repair tools, these starlink adapters also allow you to REPAIR both ends of your aging or damaged STARLINK V2 cable.

  • Special Tips: An excessively high contact resistance can result in a voltage drop across the circuit, leading to operational abnormalities in Starlink. We recommend you use single CAT6A or better ethernet cable WITHOUT coupler/extender. The starlink replacement cable length between the DISH and POE cannot exceed 75 FT. The cable length between the DISH and STARLINK Genuine Gen 2 ROUTER cannot exceed 175 FT. For home-made crimp ethernet cable, ensure a solid connection between high-quality RJ45 ends and cable. Make sure a proper installation of the waterproof socket. Do not twist or tear cable ends.PLUG AND PLAYONLY COMPATIBLE WITH STARLINK ACTUATED GEN2 / RECTANGULAR SATELLITE V2
